figures.caption: TABLE I: Performance comparison of different methods on Reddit, Instagram, and Wikics datasets.
TABLE II: Performance comparison of different methods on Reddit, Instagram, and Wikics datasets under 10% semantic corruption.

Fig. 1: The CO-EVOLVE Framework. The training follows a sequential cycle: (1) The GNN encodes structural context into Soft Prompts to guide the LLM. (2) The LLM, conditioned on these prompts, generates semantic embeddings. (3) A Semantic-Guided Structure Learning module refines the graph topology based on the updated semantics, enhanced by the Adaptive Gating. (4) The GNN updates its representations using the refined graph. The training is supervised by an Uncertainty-Gated Consistency Loss, a Hard-Structure Conflict Loss, and a classification loss, ensuring robust alignment between modalities.
TABLE III: Performance comparison of different methods on Reddit, Instagram, and Wikics datasets under 20% semantic corruption.
